prompt: Photorealistic lifestyle photo, side profile view. A young woman standing casually in a modest home kitchen, one hand resting on her hip, the other holding a small drink carton with a straw. Relaxed, neutral expression with a slightly distant gaze. Dark hair in a loose low bun with natural strands framing her face. Oversized white t-shirt worn casually, small minimal black-ink tattoos on her forearm. Wooden kitchen cabinets, countertop appliances, refrigerator covered in colorful magnets and souvenirs. Soft natural daylight from a window, warm and slightly muted atmosphere. Medium shot from mid-thigh to head, 35mm lens, moderate depth of field with background softly in focus. Light natural film grain. Calm, intimate, documentary-style aesthetic. Non-sexualized, candid slice-of-life moment.
